---
title: "MS85 Update with new data"
date: last-modified
author: Usama Bilal / Derek Weix
brand: false
format: 
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    number-sections: true
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
    toc-location: left
    code-fold: true
    page-layout: full
    embed-resources: true
editor: source
warning: false
#cache: true
cache.lazy: false
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

# Reading data

Change eval to true if running for the first time

```{r}
#| code-summary: "Loading data and saving analytic fi;le"
#| eval: false
source("00_read_data.R")
```

# Analysis

```{r}
source("01_city_specific_models.R")
source("02_meta_analysis.R")
```


# Results


```{r}
source("03_RRs.R")
source("04_results_plots.R")
source("05_tables.R")
source("06_figures.R")
```
